description: Create a nightly release GitHub Actions workflow that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes optional inputs for build number and repository URL. It sets version variables for multiple package types, then uses these variables to build various packages (C++, DEB, .NET, GEM, MATLAB, Maven, MSI, NPM, PIP, RPM, XCFramework) in separate jobs, each using a reusable workflow and passing secrets as needed.
